title: Thread State Lifecycle in Java
description: A state diagram showing the possible states of a Java Thread (from the Thread.State enum) and the transitions between them.
relationships: start() moves from NEW to RUNNABLE
Object.wait() moves from RUNNABLE to WAITING
Thread.sleep() moves from RUNNABLE to TIMED_WAITING
Waiting for a monitor lock moves from RUNNABLE to BLOCKED
Object.notify()/notifyAll() moves from WAITING to BLOCKED
sleep() time expires or join() completes moves from TIMED_WAITING to RUNNABLE
run() method exits moves from RUNNABLE to TERMINATED
